cargo_toml:
[package]
name = "find_util"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[[bin]]
name = "util"
path = "src/main.rs"

[dependencies]
libc = "0.2"
regex = "1"
deps_rationale: This implementation uses only libc for POSIX metadata/access/fnmatch/user-group lookups and regex for GNU-style -regex/-iregex approximations. It covers common traversal, tests, operators, printing, deletion and exec behavior, while intentionally simplifying locale/SELinux/xattrs/sparse handling and some exact GNU formatting details.
